title: Copying content down a column
excerpt: Is it possible to easily copy content down a column? For instance, if I have a group in which everyone has the same status, do I have to manually click to set each status or is there a way to copy it? In Excel/Sheets, yo…

posts.author: maddie_bishop (Madeline )
posts.cookedHtml: Is it possible to easily copy content down a column? For instance, if I have a group in which everyone has the same status, do I have to manually click to set each status or is there a way to copy it? In Excel/Sheets, you can click a corner of the cell and drag it down and the content will show up in every cell you select.

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @maddie_bishop,
Welcome to the community

You can select all the items you would like to change the values for and then update one item. It will apply to all the selected items.

You can read more about that here.
